context: Third QA run verifying two developer fixes: (1) preset filter pills are always non-interactive spans regardless of displayFilters setting, with active filters bar excluding preset terms; (2) data-preset-filters outputs {} instead of [] when presetFilters is empty via PHP (object) cast.

build.notes: TypeScript clean. Zero Archive-specific lint errors. Two pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Archive.tsx at lines 81 and 104 (pre-existing, non-blocking, flagged as FQA-001 in Run 1).

requirements.description: Preset pills render as non-interactive spans when displayFilters=TRUE
requirements.evidence: Section 14 (Preset Filtered Resources, displayFilters=true): presetFilterContainer=true, presetPillSpan=true (.archive-preset-pill), interactivePillButton=false, removeFilterDiv=false. PHP Archive.php condition on .archive-preset-filters no longer gated on !$displayFilters (line ~350): renders for both displayFilters states. PHP loops over preset_filters and outputs <span class='archive-preset-pill'> elements regardless of displayFilters value.

requirements.description: Preset pills render as non-interactive spans when displayFilters=FALSE
requirements.evidence: Section 15 (Curated Resources, displayFilters=false): presetFilterContainer=true, presetPillSpan=true, interactivePillButton=false, removeFilterDiv=false. No filter form rendered when displayFilters=false. Preset pills appear as static <span> elements only.

requirements.description: Interactive active filter bar excludes preset terms when displayFilters=true
requirements.evidence: interactivePillButton (.archive-active-filters button[data-field]) is false across ALL 16 sections on page audit. PHP Archive.php lines 331-333 skip preset terms in .archive-active-filters loop: if (!empty($preset_filters[$taxonomy_slug]) && in_array($term, $preset_filters[$taxonomy_slug], true)) { continue; }. JS Archive.js lines 305-307: buildButtons() filters userValues = values.filter(v => !(presetFilters[field] && presetFilters[field].indexOf(v) !== -1)), so only user-selected terms get interactive pill buttons.

requirements.description: Clear All restores preset values to hidden inputs (presets persist after clear)
requirements.evidence: Archive.js lines 229-238: Clear All handler first resets all hidden inputs to empty, then iterates Object.keys(presetFilters) and restores each preset taxonomy's hidden input value via presetInput.value = presetFilters[key].join(',')). This ensures presets persist through Clear All while user-selected filters are removed.

requirements.description: data-preset-filters outputs {} (not []) when presetFilters is empty
requirements.evidence: All 14 sections without preset filters show data-preset-filters='{}' on live page audit (confirmed via dataAttributes in page audit results). PHP Archive.php line 213 uses wp_json_encode( (object) $preset_filters ) — the (object) cast forces PHP to serialize an empty array as a JSON object {} rather than [].

taktician_validate_all returned clean build. TypeScript compilation successful. Lint clean for Archive-specific files. Two pre-existing warnings in Archive.tsx (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps at lines 81 and 104) are non-blocking and pre-existing.

preExistingIssues.description: Two pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Archive.tsx at lines 81 and 104. setAttributes missing from useEffect deps; taxonomyNames missing from useSelect deps. Non-blocking — WordPress guarantees setAttributes reference stability.

pageAuditSummary.notes: Section 14 (displayFilters=true, presetFilters set): .archive-preset-filters present with span pills; .archive-active-filters present but empty of interactive preset pills. Section 15 (displayFilters=false, presetFilters set): .archive-preset-filters present with span pills; no filter form or .archive-active-filters. All 14 remaining sections: data-preset-filters='{}' confirmed.

conclusion: All 6 requirements PASS. Both developer fixes are correctly implemented. The presetFilters feature is now complete: preset terms always appear as non-interactive span pills in .archive-preset-filters, the interactive .archive-active-filters bar is limited to user-selected terms only, Clear All preserves preset values, and the data-preset-filters JSON attribute correctly emits {} for empty objects.
